body: ERADICATION is a team-based territory control shooter on Roblox. Players must work together to push back the Whiskorian invasion and reclaim their town, surviving through escalating enemy waves.
Each match demands coordination and adaptability, the Whiskorians grow stronger as the game progresses, forcing teams to constantly adjust their strategy to survive.
features: Team-based PvE with escalating enemy waves
Regular balance updates and seasonal content

body: Favela '94 is a close-quarters tactical shooter set in the tight alleyways and rooftops of a 1994 Brazilian favela. Every engagement is personal, map knowledge and positioning are everything.
Currently in preview. Expect rough edges, rapid updates, and a dev team that's watching closely.
DON POLLO OBBY is a meme-powered obstacle course built around the legend of Don Pollo. Fast restarts, chaotic stages, and speedrun-friendly layout make it endlessly replayable.
This game has been sunset. It remains playable as a piece of Low Quality Interactive history.
